result: If I could change the world in a single stroke, I’d make high-quality education—along with the tools and support needed to use it well—available to everyone. A deeply informed, curious society can make wiser choices, innovate more responsibly, and better understand one another. Education isn’t just about jobs; it’s the foundation for empathy, resilience, and cooperation, and it opens the door to solving many other challenges.

content.text: If I could change the world in a single stroke, I’d make high-quality education—along with the tools and support needed to use it well—available to everyone. prompt: Not as an assistant. Not to help me. If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
